title: The Great Star Storm
description: A storm brought magic to Aurethos, originating from the heavens and impacting the Startouch Mountains.

title: The Madness
description: Following the storm, madness spread, affecting animals and then humans. The crisis culminated in the death of the Valleron royal family.

title: The Well of Starlight
description: Located in the Startouch Mountains, this well was a source of power before the age of kingdoms. It flowed with magic that nourished the land.
